caption: A screen capture shows a video game menu titled "HALFTIME ADJUSTMENTS: OFFENSE" from a sports simulation. A timer counts down from ":28" to ":27". The interface features lists of "ACTIVE SUPERSTARS" including names like "GENO SMITH," "NICK CHUBBA," and "JASON KELCE," along with indicators for "X-FACTOR LIMIT" and "AP LIMIT." The top half of the screen displays a strategic option for "DOUBLE ME," while the bottom half switches to "FREIGHT TRAIN" with details on "GOAL LINE BACK" and "BRUSER." In the bottom-left corner, a small inset window shows a fair-skinned man with blond hair wearing a black shirt, resting his chin on his hand with a thoughtful expression. A festive holiday decoration with lights is visible behind him. The layout remains mostly static, with only the timer and the selected strategic ability changing as the sequence progresses.
